title: The RealReal Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results
text: The RealReal reported Q4 2023 and full year 2023 results. Q4 2023 net loss was $22 million, compared to $39 million in Q4 2022. Q4 2023 adjusted EBITDA was positive $1.4 million, a $22 million improvement compared to Q4 2022. Full year 2023 net loss was $168 million, compared to $196 million for full year 2022. Full year 2023 adjusted EBITDA was $(55) million, compared to $(112) million for full year 2022. In the fourth quarter of 2023, The RealReal delivered positive adjusted EBITDA and positive free cash flow, which the company noted as historic milestones since their 2019 IPO. The achievement marked an inflection point in the company's profitability trajectory, with significant margin improvement from prior years. Management emphasized the strength of the consignment business and the benefits of portfolio optimization and cost reduction initiatives implemented throughout 2023.
